name: Three-Pepper Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 pizza crust 10-inch ready made, partially cooked
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 425°F.
2 Lightly grease a 12-inch round pizza pan.
3 Spread half of the cheese on the crust.
4 Sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
5 Arrange peppers evenly over the top.
6 Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
7 Bake at 425°F for 8-10 minutes, or until crust is deep golden brown and cheese is melted.
